title: cataria paniculata
intro: Cataria paniculata, also known as Catnip, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Nepeta cataria) and native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being an antispasmodic, anxiolytic, and a stimulant for the senses. The health benefits of Catnip include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate pain and inflammation. Catnip is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used fresh or dried in herbal remedies.
